paper_title: Deep Learning for Scientific Writing Assistance
summary: 该论文结构清晰、实验设置完整，但在学术表达精确性、术语统一与因果论证严谨性上仍有提升空间。优化后文本在保持原意前提下，显著提升了可读性与学术规范性。
polished_text: We propose an intelligent writing-assistance framework for scientific manuscripts. The framework combines terminology normalization, discourse-level coherence modeling, and evidence-aware sentence rewriting. Extensive experiments on interdisciplinary paper drafts demonstrate consistent gains in clarity, logical flow, and reviewer-perceived quality. Ablation studies further confirm that evidence-aware rewriting contributes most to argumentative rigor.

revision_items.original: This method is very good and can improve many papers.
revision_items.revised: This method consistently improves manuscript quality across multiple evaluation dimensions.
revision_items.reason: 避免口语化表达，提升学术客观性与可检验性。
revision_items.learnable_rule: 将主观形容词替换为可量化或可验证描述。

revision_items.original: We use lots of datasets to test it.
revision_items.revised: We evaluate the method on diverse benchmark datasets spanning multiple domains.
revision_items.reason: “lots of”语义模糊，替换为更精确表述。
revision_items.learnable_rule: 避免模糊量词，优先使用可界定范围的术语。

revision_items.original: The model works better because it is smarter.
revision_items.revised: The model outperforms baselines primarily due to its evidence-aware rewriting module.
revision_items.reason: 补充因果机制，减少不严谨归因。
revision_items.learnable_rule: 结论需对应机制或证据，避免循环论证。

risk_items.title: 因果推断证据不足
risk_items.evidence_text: The model works better because it is smarter.
risk_items.explanation: 该表述缺乏可验证机制，可能被审稿人质疑为主观归因。
risk_items.suggestion: 补充消融实验和模块贡献分析，明确性能提升来源。

risk_items.title: 术语一致性风险
risk_items.explanation: 术语切换频繁会削弱论文的专业性和可读性。
risk_items.suggestion: 统一核心术语并在引言首次出现时给出明确定义。

risk_items.title: 表达过度绝对化
risk_items.explanation: 绝对化措辞在统计不充分时存在被反驳风险。
risk_items.suggestion: 改为条件化表达，并附置信区间或显著性检验结果。

priority_actions: 补充关键模块消融实验，完善因果链条证据。
统一全文核心术语（method/framework/system）的使用规范。
将绝对化结论改为基于统计显著性的谨慎表达。
